# Scheduler task-transition graph

*From a live boot. Nodes are tasks (named via `ThreadRegister`); an edge `a → b` labelled `N` means the scheduler switched from `a` to `b` `N` times. Disconnected clusters are separate harts.*

```mermaid
graph LR
    t3["hart_1_main"]
    t4["init"]
    t5["spawnee"]
    t0["main"]
    t1["idle"]
    t2["exit_smoke"]
    t6["fs-server"]
    t7["fs-client"]
    t3 -->|3| t4
    t4 -->|3| t3
    t3 -->|2| t5
    t0 -->|1007| t1
    t1 -->|1| t2
    t2 -->|1| t0
    t5 -->|1| t4
    t5 -->|1| t6
    t1 -->|1005| t0
    t6 -->|2| t7
    t7 -->|15| t3
    t4 -->|1| t6
    t3 -->|13| t6
    t6 -->|14| t3
    t3 -->|14| t7
    t7 -->|1| t6
```
